final:
module top_module(
    input wire [31:0] input_data,
    input wire [4:0] shift_amount,
    output reg [31:0] rotated_data
    );always @(*) begin
        if (shift_amount == 0) begin
            rotated_data = input_data;
        end
        else begin
            rotated_data = (input_data << shift_amount) | (input_data >> (32 - shift_amount));
        end
    end

endmodule
